data.title: Ericsson, Leonardo, and Italian Navy test 5G Standalone at sea. Long-range data communication and on-board connectivity successful. Live trials in real conditions.
data.description: Successful trials were conducted in STOCKHOLM to demonstrate long-range 5G SA data communication at sea. On-board connectivity and naval vessel systems were tested, with live trials carried out over an extended period in various operational conditions. The tests showed promising results, signaling advancements in maritime communication technology. The demonstration showcased the capability for efficient data transmission over substantial distances, highlighting the potential for enhanced connectivity at sea.

data.title: Halfpricesoft.com provides guide and video for 1095-C data import with ez1095 to support employers meet ACA deadlines efficiently.
data.description: Providing essential guidance to employers, a newly released instructional video and accompanying support offer invaluable assistance in meeting Affordable Care Act (ACA) deadlines. Halfpricesoft.com, based in REDMOND, Wash., unveiled this initiative on Feb. 16, 2026. The video showcases how to seamlessly import 1095-C data from a spreadsheet, hence instilling confidence among employers striving to fulfill ACA requirements. This service aims to enhance customer satisfaction and streamline the compliance process.

data.title: X-Humanoid launches Embodied Tien Kung 3.0, a more open and practical humanoid robotics platform in Beijing.
data.description: The Embodied Tien Kung 3.0, the latest general-purpose robot platform developed by the Beijing Innovation Center of Humanoid Robotics (X-Humanoid), has been officially launched in Beijing on February 16, 2026. This new robot platform is aimed at providing improved openness and usability. Leveraging X-Humanoid's expertise, the Embodied Tien Kung 3.0 is designed to offer advanced capabilities in robotics technology.

data.title: bb.q Chicken uses Deliverect to streamline operations in all US locations. Fast-growing franchise aims to scale efficiently.
data.description: In a press release on February 16, 2026, bb.q Chicken, a rapidly expanding Korean fried chicken chain in the US, revealed a new digital platform. This platform integrates various online ordering platforms and streamlines menu management. The innovation aims to assist restaurants in the US in expanding efficiently. The platform's launch follows bb.q Chicken's success in the country, where it is recognized as one of the fastest-growing Korean fried chicken franchises. The platform's capabilities offer a centralized approach to managing menus, improving scalability for restaurants.

data.title: Seventh edition of S.Pellegrino Young Chef Academy Competition begins, inviting chefs under 30 to apply. Applications open 16th February. MILAN, Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: On February 16th, applications officially opened for the seventh edition of the S.Pellegrino Young Chef Academy Competition in Milan. This global initiative is seeking the most talented chefs under the age of 30. The competition aims to identify and showcase young culinary talent from around the world. The application process invites aspiring chefs to showcase their skills and creativity, with a chance to compete on a global stage. This opportunity is open to chefs worldwide, providing a platform for young talent to shine.

data.description: ReNew Energy Global Plc, based in Gurugram, India, released its unaudited consolidated IFRS results for the third quarter of the fiscal year 2026 and the nine months ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: By late February 2026, BCH price targets $580-630 range. Short-term: $580-630, medium-term: $650-750. Bullish breakout at $583.50, support at $537.30. Crypto projection shared.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price is expected to range between $580 and $630. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), forecasts suggest a price range of $650 to $750. A bullish breakout is anticipated at the $583.50 mark, with critical support seen at $537.30. These predictions reflect current trends in the cryptocurrency market for BCH.

data.title: Aspocomp to release Financial Statement 2025 on Feb 25, 2026. CEO to host webcast at 10:00 a.m. Finnish time. Contact Manu Skyttä for more info.
data.description: Aspocomp Group Plc announced that they will publish their Financial Statement Release for the period January 1 to December 31, 2025, on February 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Finnish time. The CEO, Manu Skyttä, will present the report in a webcast starting at 10:00 a.m. Finnish time on the same day, accessible at https://aspocomp.events. The webcast will be in Finnish, with written questions accepted through the chat feature. Presentation materials in English and a recording in Finnish will be available on the company's website. Aspocomp is known for providing PCB technology design, testing, and logistics services globally, catering to companies in various sectors. They are headquartered in Espoo with a plant in Oulu, Finland. For more information, contact Manu Skyttä.

data.title: AI safety firm Anthropic doubles revenue since October, opens Bengaluru office as India becomes second-largest Claude market.
data.description: An AI safety company called Anthropic has recently expanded its operations in India by opening a new office in Bengaluru. The company has also forged partnerships with various enterprises in the region and has launched initiatives focusing on multilingual capabilities. During this expansion phase, Anthropic has witnessed a significant boost in its revenue, with the numbers doubling since October.

data.title: ATOM predicted to hit $2.67 breakout in March 2026. Short-term target $2.25, support level $2.05. Bullish forecast: $2.05-$2.67 range.
data.description: Summary of ATOM Price Prediction: In the short term, the target price for ATOM is set at $2.25 within the next week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast ranges from $2.05 to $2.67 over the course of a month. A bullish breakout is anticipated if the price reaches $2.67, while a critical support level is identified at $2.05. These figures provide valuable insights for traders and investors in the crypto market.

data.title: UNI price expected to rise to $4.03-$4.13 by March 2026. Currently at $3.55 with RSI at 39.15. Analysts foresee a possible breakout in March.
data.description: The cryptocurrency UNI is currently being traded at $3.55 per unit, showing an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 39.15. According to technical analysts, there is a target price range of $4.03 to $4.13 anticipated for a potential recovery as Uniswap nears crucial support levels, suggesting a likely breakout in March.
